UHA-23  MAXIMUM ALLOWABLE STRESS VALUES FOR HIGH ALLOY STEELS. (a) The maximum allowable stress values for high alloy steels at various temperatures are given in the tables of this paragraph. (b) These stress values shall be used in the design formulas of UG-27 and UG-28 in conjunction with the joint efficiency from UW-12. (c) At elevated temperatures, the time-dependent values shall govern. For carbon and low alloy steel stress values, see UCS-23. General stress value requirements are in UG-23. Material specifications shall be in accordance with UG-80. Welding requirements shall comply with UHA-32.
